title: Chiclayo, LA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chiclayo, LA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chiclayo is a city in LA with a population of 600,000. The capital of northern Peruvian cuisine, a bustling city near the Lord of Sipán archaeological site.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
